name: stale-ci-warnings-in-pr-comment
description: Surface stale CI pattern warnings in PR comment body rather than stderr only. Use when: (1) validate_test_coverage.py already detects stale patterns but only prints to stderr, (2) you want reviewers to see stale warnings without inspecting raw CI logs, (3) post_to_pr() should fire on stale patterns even when no uncovered files exist.
